subcodes.first_line: O thou sweet medicine of the pain-stricken! Render thanks unto the unsullied Lord, that in His divine meadow thou art even as a plaintive bird [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نوش ای داروی دردمندان شکر کن یزدان پاک را که در مرغزار الهی چون مرغ زار
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @praise and encouragement, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
